entropy_floor_description: 2nd-order Markov oracle: P(s_n | s_{n-1}, s_{n-2}). Context table overhead omitted.
1st-order Markov oracle: P(s_n | s_{n-1}). Context table overhead omitted.
Each tensor encoded against its own empirical PMF. Provable per-tensor-marginal floor.
Same as iid_per_tensor; tensor index treated as side-info.
All symbols treated as iid from a single pooled empirical PMF. Provable iid-pooled floor.
